scripts.watchfull: nodemon -e scss -x "npm run compile:css && npm run compile:cssfonts"
scripts.build:css: node-sass --source-map-root scss --include-path scss src/scss/app.scss | postcss --use autoprefixer -b 'latest 4 versions' | cssmin > public/css/main.min.css
scripts.compile:css: node-sass --output-style compressed --include-path scss src/scss/app.scss public/css/main.min.css --source-map true --source-map-contents sass
